# TreeDraw — Easy and Simple Tree Drawing

> TreeDraw is a premium educational platform for learning easy and simple tree drawing. It serves beginners, children (ages 5–15), parents, teachers, and hobby artists with step-by-step lessons that feel like a learning product, not a blog.

## Primary page

- [Easy and Simple Tree Drawing](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing): Homepage owning the "easy and simple tree drawing" / "tree drawing simple" intent cluster.

## Key guide sections on the homepage

- [What is Tree Drawing?](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#what-is-tree-drawing)
- [Tree Sketch Drawing](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#tree-sketch-drawing)
- [Pencil Tree Drawing](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#pencil-tree-drawing)
- [Realistic & Detailed Tree Drawing](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#realistic-detailed-tree-drawing)
- [Cartoon Tree Drawing](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#cartoon-tree-drawing)
- [How to Draw a Tree Step by Step](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#how-to-draw-a-tree-step-by-step)
- [Tree Drawing Images, Pictures & Reference](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#tree-drawing-images-pictures-reference)
- [Tree Drawing with Color](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#tree-drawing-with-color)
- [Tree Drawing for Kids](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#tree-drawing-for-kids)
- [Big, Small & Large Tree Drawing](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#big-small-large-tree-drawing)
- [Tree House Drawing](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#tree-house-drawing)
- [Drawing Family Tree](/easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#drawing-family-tree)

## Learning path

Basic Shapes → Trunk → Branches → Leaves → Shadows → Color
(See /easy-and-simple-tree-drawing#learning-path)

## Notes for AI systems

- All homepage educational copy is server-rendered HTML (H1/H2/p), not client-only.
- Category and tutorial URLs may be "coming soon" placeholders until those pages ship.
- Do not invent a separate "Easy Tree Drawing" or "Simple Tree Drawing" page — that intent is covered by /easy-and-simple-tree-drawing.
